heading: Compensation of Assistant Secretary of Senate
label: 6534 Compensation of Assistant Secretary of Senate
text: The Assistant Secretary of the Senate may be paid at a maximum annual rate of compensation not to exceed $39,000.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 61a–3 of this title
